product_overview: A restaurant operations platform for staff to log in and manage tables, delivery orders, cash payments, customers, inventory, expenses, staff assignments, and reporting. It provides role-based access for day-to-day service operations and back-office oversight.
core_goals: Log in to the system and access role-based operations
Manage restaurant tables and associated orders
Process delivery and pickup-related order workflows
Handle customer payments and daily cash closing
Maintain customer, staff, menu, inventory, and expense records

features.name: User Login
features.description: Staff authenticate with a username and 4-digit PIN to access the system.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Enter username -> Enter 4-digit PIN -> Submit login form -> See dashboard
Navigate to /login -> Enter username -> Enter an invalid 4-digit PIN -> Submit login form -> See an error message

features.name: Dashboard
features.description: Users land on a role-aware home view with sales, operations, and navigation shortcuts.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> View today's sales metrics -> View operational status and top products -> Navigate to another section from the dashboard

features.name: Table Management
features.description: Staff view table status, open orders from a table, add items, update order state, and close the order.
user_flows: Navigate to /tables -> View the table grid with status colors -> Open a table order -> Add products to the order -> Review order items and total -> Update the order status -> Close the order and complete payment
Navigate to /tables -> Open a table order -> Add products to the order -> Remove an added item -> Review the updated total -> Close the order and complete payment

features.name: Delivery Management
features.description: Staff manage delivery orders through a kanban-style workflow and assign delivery personnel.
user_flows: Navigate to /delivery -> View delivery orders by status -> Open an order's details -> Assign a delivery person -> Move the order through status stages -> Mark the order as delivered and close it

features.name: Cashier Payment
features.description: Cashier users process pending orders, select payment methods, add tips, split bills, and view paid orders.
user_flows: Navigate to /cashier -> View pending orders -> Open an order for payment -> Select a payment method -> Add a tip percentage -> Close the order with payment
Navigate to /cashier -> View pending orders -> Open an order for payment -> Calculate a split bill -> Close the order with payment -> View the order in the paid list

features.name: Cash Closing
features.description: Managers or cashiers preview the daily cash closing, enter counted amounts, add notes, and create the Z-report closing.
user_flows: Navigate to /cashier/closing -> Review the closing preview -> Enter initial cash amount -> Enter counted cash amount -> Add notes -> Create the cash closing
Navigate to /cashier/closing -> Review the closing preview -> Create the cash closing -> Navigate to /cashier/closing/history -> View historical closings

features.name: Expense Management
features.description: Administrators track business expenses with filtering, creation, edits, deletions, and summary totals.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/expenses -> View the expense list and summary -> Create a new expense -> Review the updated expense list
Navigate to /admin/expenses -> Filter the expense list -> Open an expense for editing -> Update the expense details -> Save the changes
Navigate to /admin/expenses -> Open an expense for removal -> Delete the expense -> View the refreshed expense list

features.name: Staff Management
features.description: Administrators manage delivery personnel, waiters, and table assignments.
user_flows: Navigate to /staff -> View delivery persons and waiters -> Create a delivery person or waiter -> Review the updated staff lists
Navigate to /staff -> View table assignments -> Assign tables to a waiter -> Review the updated assignment list
Navigate to /staff -> View a waiter history record -> Review past waiter activity and assignments

features.name: Reports
features.description: Administrators review business performance summaries, rankings, peak hours, and printable daily reports.
user_flows: Navigate to /reports -> View sales summary KPIs -> Review top products, top customers, and peak hours -> Open daily history
Navigate to /reports -> Generate a daily report -> View the printable daily report breakdown

features.name: Inventory Management
features.description: Administrators monitor stock levels, record stock movements, and review movement history.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/inventory -> View product stock levels -> Identify low stock items -> Update a product's stock level -> Review the updated stock list
Navigate to /admin/inventory -> Record a stock entry, exit, or adjustment -> View the movement history -> Confirm the stock movement is listed

features.name: Customer Management
features.description: Staff search for customers, create new customer records, update details, and review order history.
user_flows: Navigate to /customers -> Search for a customer by name or phone -> View matching customer records -> Open a customer profile -> Review order history
Navigate to /customers -> Create a new customer -> Save the customer record -> See the customer in the list
Navigate to /customers -> Open a customer record -> Update customer details -> Save the changes

routes.description: Admin dashboard with KPIs, operations, top products. Waiter home with assigned tables and personal stats
Kanban board for pickup/takeaway orders with turn system
Table grid with real-time status, order modal for adding items
Payment processing, pending/paid tabs, tip selection, split bill
Z-report cash closing with preview, form, and historical detail
Table of past cash closings with date range filter
List of unpaid orders with pay-debt functionality
Customer CRUD, search by name/phone, order history
Expense CRUD with filters, summary, net income
Admin: full CRUD for categories and products. Waiter: read-only catalog
Manage delivery persons, waiters, tables, and assignments
Sales reports, top products, customers, peak hours, history
Printable daily report with full breakdown

features.name: User Login
features.description: PIN-based authentication with 4-digit numeric keypad
user_interactions: Click login button or press Enter
See error message on invalid credentials

features.name: Dashboard
features.description: Admin dashboard with KPIs and operations overview
user_interactions: View today's sales, orders, average ticket
View operational status (unassigned tables, preparing orders, etc.)
Navigate to different sections via sidebar

features.name: Table Management
features.description: View and manage restaurant tables with order status
user_interactions: View table grid with color-coded status (free/occupied/ready)
Click table to open order modal

features.name: Delivery Management
features.description: Kanban board for managing delivery orders

features.name: Cashier Payment
features.description: Process payments for orders

features.name: Cash Closing
features.description: Daily cash register closing (Z-report)

features.name: Expense Management
features.description: Track and manage business expenses
user_interactions: Create new expense with category, amount, description

features.name: Staff Management
features.description: Manage delivery persons, waiters, tables, and assignments

features.name: Reports
features.description: Business intelligence and reporting
user_interactions: View top products by quantity or revenue

features.name: Inventory Management
features.description: Track product stock and movements

features.name: Customer Management
features.description: Manage delivery customers
user_interactions: Search customers by name or phone

known_limitations.issue: No real-time updates - uses polling every 20-30 seconds

known_limitations.impact: Customers can only be created or updated, not deleted
Waiters can only be created, not modified or removed

known_limitations.issue: Cash closings are immutable once created
known_limitations.impact: Cannot correct mistakes in historical closings
Users cannot change their own PIN
Expense categories are seeded and cannot be customized
Hard limits of 200-500 records with no way to load more
Cash closing calculations use fixed timezone
Users are logged out after 12 hours with no warning
